sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109179" key="u(po/spilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόσπῐλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather spotted,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:15:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
